subject: Re: Radar
body:
burkle? are they still in negotiations


--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Rich and Emad met with Seed people today and went to
> visit the Radar  space.  
> Rich and Emad will go over Radar books in depth
> tomorrow.
>  
> Comparing the fiscal responsibility of the two
> magazines is like night and  
> day. 
>  
> Larry Marcus from Daily News' legal department
> called to advise me that  Mort 
> would be speaking to you about severance for Maer. 
> Larry recommends 6  
> months, which is down from Maer's original demand
> for 18 months.  I asked  Larry to 
> provide me with a copy of Maer's employment
> agreement which I forwarded  to 
> you yesterday.  I also asked Larry to consider
> offsetting costs  associated 
> with Carver Cross Securities cases and fraud
> damages.  Larry  said that he would 
> put together time and cost allocations relating to
> these  issues.
>  
> I will try to put together additional issues and
> speak to you about them  
> tomorrow.
>  
> Darren
> 


__________________________________________________

body_html:
burkle? are they still in negotiations

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Rich and Emad met with Seed people today and went to
visit the Radar space.
Rich and Emad will go over Radar books in depth
tomorrow.

Comparing the fiscal responsibility of the two
magazines is like night and
day.

Larry Marcus from Daily News' legal department
called to advise me that Mort
would be speaking to you about severance for Maer.
Larry recommends 6
months, which is down from Maer's original demand
for 18 months. I asked Larry to
provide me with a copy of Maer's employment
agreement which I forwarded to
you yesterday. I also asked Larry to consider
offsetting costs associated
with Carver Cross Securities cases and fraud
damages. Larry said that he would
put together time and cost allocations relating to
these issues.

I will try to put together additional issues and
speak to you about them
tomorrow.

Darren
